---
mode: 'MyPlaywrightMode'
---

Execute this actions using MCP playwright:

Navigate to <https://microsoftedge.github.io/Demos/demo-to-do/>
Add a list of to do items:

- "Buy groceries"
- "Walk the dog"
- "Read a book"
- "Call mom"

Try to use different ways to add the items (e.g., using the input field and the add button, using keyboard shortcuts if available).

Delete the to do item "Read a book".

DO NOT CREATE FILES OR SCRIPTS, EXECUTE ACTIONS USING A BROWSER
